mapper.select: SELECT id, provider, provider_id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, role, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, suspended_from, suspended_until, demoted_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, provider, provider_id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, role, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, suspended_from, suspended_until, demoted_at FROM users WHERE
id IN
#{userId}
1 = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (provider, provider_id, email, nickname, profile_image_url, role) VALUES (#{provider}, #{providerId}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickname}, #{profileImageUrl}, #{role})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET deleted_at = now() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM challenges WHERE host_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('RECRUITING', 'IN_PROGRESS') ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM challenge_participants cp JOIN challenges c ON cp.challenge_id = c.id WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} AND cp.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.status IN ('RECRUITING', 'IN_PROGRESS') )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND profile_image_url = #{expectedUrl}
